author: mthuret
subject: v4.0.5
body: ## [4.0.5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.0.4...v4.0.5) (2017-06-26) ### Bug Fixes * **MultiIndex:** ensure getResults return only hits matching index in the context (algolia/react-instantsearch#136) ([fab8cd0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/fab8cd0)) * **MultiIndex:** handle if namespace isn't in search state (algolia/react-instantsearch#139) ([12e9900](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/12e9900)) * **storybook:** process CSS through autoprefixer (algolia/react-instantsearch#138) ([12aeec5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/12aeec5))
